title: Oups!
collaboration: Interactive video installation by Marcio Ambrosio
description:
Dedicated software developed in MaxMSP-Jitter
                            / Motion tracking techniques are used to analyze different aspects of the detected visitor's silhouette
	                        / The engine allows Marcio to add a scene by feeding it a folder with named animation clips with alpha and sound files.
	                        / A naming convention allows him to place the image in the foreground or background 
	                        / It's also possible to attach the images to several anchor points on the detected visitor (eg center of mass - head - feet)
